base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_high_jump_boots — a pickup_item from 1986 metroid. High Jump Boots — boots permanently double jump height. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: High Jump Boots — boots permanently double jump height; found in Brinstar
